CustomField.formula: IF((RecordType.Name == 'Assets'|| RecordType.Name == 'Expense')&& !isContra_Account__c ,(Opening_Balance__c + Credit_Limit__c )-(Total_Credit__c - Total_Debit__c),IF(RecordType.Name == 'Assets' && isContra_Account__c ,(Opening_Balance__c+ Credit_Limit__c )+Total_Credit__c,IF(isContra_Account__c,(Opening_Balance__c + Credit_Limit__c )+(Total_Debit__c-Total_Credit__c),(Opening_Balance__c + Credit_Limit__c )+(Total_Credit__c - Total_Debit__c))))
CustomField.label: Calculated Ending Balance
